when.test: tab == null or tab == '' or tab == 'EMP_BASE'

choose.when:
SELECT TO_CHAR(e.PAY_SEQ) AS histKey, 'EMP_BASE' AS tab, CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL(e.START_DTM, DATE '1900-01-01')) AND TRUNC(NVL(e.END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')) THEN 'CURRENT' ELSE 'ENDED' END AS status, d.DEPT_NM AS deptNm, p.POS_CD AS posCd, p.POS_NM AS posNm, em.EMP_NM AS empNm, em.EMP_NO AS empNo, NVL( e.BASE_AMT, NVL( ( SELECT gb.STD_AMT FROM ( SELECT g.STD_AMT FROM GRADE_BASE_AMT g WHERE g.POS_CD = em.POS_CD AND TRUNC(NVL(g.END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')) >= TRUNC(NVL(e.START_DTM, DATE '1900-01-01')) AND TRUNC(NVL(g.START_DT, DATE '1900-01-01')) <= TRUNC(NVL(e.END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')) ORDER BY g.START_DT DESC, g.BASE_AMT_NO DESC ) gb WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ), 0 ) ) AS baseAmt, e.BANK_NAME AS bankName, e.ACCNT_NO AS accntNo, e.DEDUCT_FAM_CNT AS deductFamCnt, e.SALARY_GRADE AS salaryGrade, e.ADJUST_RSN AS adjustRsn, TO_CHAR(e.START_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDtm, TO_CHAR(e.END_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDtm FROM EMP_PAY_INFO e JOIN EMP em ON em.EMP_NO = e.EMP_NO LEFT JOIN DEPT d ON d.DEPT_CD = em.DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN POSITION_MST p ON p.POS_CD = em.POS_CD
AND TRUNC(NVL(e.END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')) >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TRUNC(NVL(e.START_DTM, DATE '1900-01-01')) <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND d.DEPT_NM = #{deptNm}
AND p.POS_CD = #{posCd}
AND em.EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{empNm} || '%'
AND em.EMP_NO LIKE '%' || #{empNo} || '%'
AND e.BANK_NAME LIKE '%' || #{bankName} || '%'
AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL(e.START_DTM, DATE '1900-01-01')) AND TRUNC(NVL(e.END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31'))
AND NOT (TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL(e.START_DTM, DATE '1900-01-01')) AND TRUNC(NVL(e.END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')))
ORDER BY e.START_DTM DESC, e.PAY_SEQ DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT TO_CHAR(g.BASE_AMT_NO) AS histKey, 'POS_BASE' AS tab, CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL(g.START_DT, DATE '1900-01-01')) AND TRUNC(NVL(g.END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')) THEN 'CURRENT' ELSE 'ENDED' END AS status, g.POS_CD AS posCd, p.POS_NM AS posNm, NVL(g.STD_AMT, 0) AS stdAmt, g.BASE_AMT_NO AS baseAmtNo, TO_CHAR(g.START_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDtm, TO_CHAR(g.END_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDtm FROM GRADE_BASE_AMT g LEFT JOIN POSITION_MST p ON p.POS_CD = g.POS_CD
AND TRUNC(NVL(g.END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')) >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TRUNC(NVL(g.START_DT, DATE '1900-01-01')) <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND g.POS_CD = #{posCd}
AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL(g.START_DT, DATE '1900-01-01')) AND TRUNC(NVL(g.END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31'))
AND NOT (TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL(g.START_DT, DATE '1900-01-01')) AND TRUNC(NVL(g.END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')))
ORDER BY g.START_DT DESC, g.BASE_AMT_NO DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT TO_CHAR(s.START_GRP, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS histKey, 'STEP_SET' AS tab, s.status AS status, s.useYn AS useYn, s.stepCount AS stepCount, TO_CHAR(s.createdDtm, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createdDtm, TO_CHAR(s.START_GRP, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDtm, TO_CHAR(s.END_GRP, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDtm FROM ( SELECT TRUNC(START_DTM) AS START_GRP, TRUNC(MAX(END_DTM)) AS END_GRP, MIN(CREATED_DTM) AS createdDtm, MAX(USE_YN) AS useYn, COUNT(*) AS stepCount, CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL(START_DTM, DATE '1900-01-01')) AND TRUNC(NVL(END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')) AND USE_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN 'CURRENT' ELSE 'ENDED' END AS status FROM STEP_RATE
AND TRUNC(NVL(END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')) >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TRUNC(NVL(START_DTM, DATE '1900-01-01')) <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY TRUNC(START_DTM) ) s
AND s.status = #{status}
ORDER BY s.START_GRP DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT TO_CHAR(i.RATE_NO) AS histKey, 'INSURANCE' AS tab, CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL(i.START_DTM, DATE '1900-01-01')) AND TRUNC(NVL(i.END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')) THEN 'CURRENT' ELSE 'ENDED' END AS status, i.RATE_NO AS rateNo, i.PENSION_RATE AS pensionRate, i.HEALTH_RATE AS healthRate, i.EMPLOY_RATE AS employRate, i.CARE_RATE AS careRate, i.INCOME_TAX_RATE AS incomeTaxRate, i.LOCAL_TAX_RATE AS localTaxRate, TO_CHAR(i.START_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDtm, TO_CHAR(i.END_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDtm FROM INSURANCE_RATE i
AND TRUNC(NVL(i.END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')) >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TRUNC(NVL(i.START_DTM, DATE '1900-01-01')) <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL(i.START_DTM, DATE '1900-01-01')) AND TRUNC(NVL(i.END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31'))
AND NOT (TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL(i.START_DTM, DATE '1900-01-01')) AND TRUNC(NVL(i.END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')))
ORDER BY i.START_DTM DESC, i.RATE_NO DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

when.test: tab == null or tab == '' or tab == 'EMP_BASE'

choose.when:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM EMP_PAY_INFO e JOIN EMP em ON em.EMP_NO = e.EMP_NO LEFT JOIN DEPT d ON d.DEPT_CD = em.DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN POSITION_MST p ON p.POS_CD = em.POS_CD
AND TRUNC(NVL(e.END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')) >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TRUNC(NVL(e.START_DTM, DATE '1900-01-01')) <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND d.DEPT_NM = #{deptNm}
AND p.POS_CD = #{posCd}
AND em.EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{empNm} || '%'
AND em.EMP_NO LIKE '%' || #{empNo} || '%'
AND e.BANK_NAME LIKE '%' || #{bankName} || '%'
AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL(e.START_DTM, DATE '1900-01-01')) AND TRUNC(NVL(e.END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31'))
AND NOT (TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL(e.START_DTM, DATE '1900-01-01')) AND TRUNC(NVL(e.END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')))

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM GRADE_BASE_AMT g LEFT JOIN POSITION_MST p ON p.POS_CD = g.POS_CD
AND TRUNC(NVL(g.END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')) >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TRUNC(NVL(g.START_DT, DATE '1900-01-01')) <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND g.POS_CD = #{posCd}
AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL(g.START_DT, DATE '1900-01-01')) AND TRUNC(NVL(g.END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31'))
AND NOT (TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL(g.START_DT, DATE '1900-01-01')) AND TRUNC(NVL(g.END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')))

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT 1 FROM STEP_RATE
AND TRUNC(NVL(END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')) >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TRUNC(NVL(START_DTM, DATE '1900-01-01')) <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY TRUNC(START_DTM)
HAVING MAX(CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL(START_DTM, DATE '1900-01-01')) AND TRUNC(NVL(END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')) AND USE_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) =
1 0
)

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM INSURANCE_RATE i
AND TRUNC(NVL(i.END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')) >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TRUNC(NVL(i.START_DTM, DATE '1900-01-01')) <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL(i.START_DTM, DATE '1900-01-01')) AND TRUNC(NVL(i.END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31'))
AND NOT (TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL(i.START_DTM, DATE '1900-01-01')) AND TRUNC(NVL(i.END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')))

mapper.select: SELECT STEP_RATE_NO AS stepRateNo, SALARY_STEP AS salaryStep, INCREASE_RATE AS increaseRate, TO_CHAR(CREATED_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createdDtm, TO_CHAR(START_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDtm, TO_CHAR(END_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDtm, USE_YN AS useYn FROM STEP_RATE WHERE TRUNC(START_DTM) = TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY SALARY_STEP

SELECT TO_CHAR(h.APNT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS apntDt, e.EMP_NM AS empNm, NVL(db.DEPT_NM, '-') AS bfDeptNm, NVL(da.DEPT_NM, '-') AS afDeptNm, NVL(h.APNT_RSN, '-') AS apntRsn, p.EMP_NM AS procEmpNm FROM HR_APNT_HIST h JOIN EMP e ON e.EMP_NO = h.EMP_NO JOIN EMP p ON p.EMP_NO = h.PROC_EMP_NO LEFT JOIN DEPT db ON db.DEPT_CD = h.BF_DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN DEPT da ON da.DEPT_CD = h.AF_DEPT_CD
AND h.APNT_DT >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND h.APNT_DT < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND e.EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{empNm} || '%'
AND p.EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{procEmpNm} || '%'
AND NVL(db.DEPT_NM, '-') LIKE '%' || #{bfDeptNm} || '%'
AND NVL(da.DEPT_NM, '-') LIKE '%' || #{afDeptNm} || '%'
AND NVL(h.APNT_RSN, '-') LIKE '%' || #{apntRsn} || '%'
ORDER BY h.APNT_DT DESC, e.EMP_NM ASC, p.EMP_NM ASC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM HR_APNT_HIST h JOIN EMP e ON e.EMP_NO = h.EMP_NO JOIN EMP p ON p.EMP_NO = h.PROC_EMP_NO LEFT JOIN DEPT db ON db.DEPT_CD = h.BF_DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN DEPT da ON da.DEPT_CD = h.AF_DEPT_CD
AND h.APNT_DT >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND h.APNT_DT < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND e.EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{empNm} || '%'
AND p.EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{procEmpNm} || '%'
AND NVL(db.DEPT_NM, '-') LIKE '%' || #{bfDeptNm} || '%'
AND NVL(da.DEPT_NM, '-') LIKE '%' || #{afDeptNm} || '%'
AND NVL(h.APNT_RSN, '-') LIKE '%' || #{apntRsn} || '%'

SELECT TO_CHAR(h.PROMO_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS promoDt, e.EMP_NM AS empNm, NVL(pb.POS_NM, '-') AS bfPosNm, NVL(pa.POS_NM, '-') AS afPosNm, NVL(h.PROMO_RSN, '-') AS promoRsn, p.EMP_NM AS procEmpNm FROM PROMOTION_HIST h JOIN EMP e ON e.EMP_NO = h.EMP_NO JOIN EMP p ON p.EMP_NO = h.PROC_EMP_NO LEFT JOIN POSITION_MST pb ON pb.POS_CD = h.BF_POS_CD LEFT JOIN POSITION_MST pa ON pa.POS_CD = h.AF_POS_CD
AND h.PROMO_DT >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND h.PROMO_DT < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND e.EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{empNm} || '%'
AND p.EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{procEmpNm} || '%'
AND NVL(pb.POS_NM, '-') LIKE '%' || #{bfPosNm} || '%'
AND NVL(pa.POS_NM, '-') LIKE '%' || #{afPosNm} || '%'
AND NVL(h.PROMO_RSN, '-') LIKE '%' || #{promoRsn} || '%'
ORDER BY h.PROMO_DT DESC, e.EMP_NM ASC, p.EMP_NM ASC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM PROMOTION_HIST h JOIN EMP e ON e.EMP_NO = h.EMP_NO JOIN EMP p ON p.EMP_NO = h.PROC_EMP_NO LEFT JOIN POSITION_MST pb ON pb.POS_CD = h.BF_POS_CD LEFT JOIN POSITION_MST pa ON pa.POS_CD = h.AF_POS_CD
AND h.PROMO_DT >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND h.PROMO_DT < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND e.EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{empNm} || '%'
AND p.EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{procEmpNm} || '%'
AND NVL(pb.POS_NM, '-') LIKE '%' || #{bfPosNm} || '%'
AND NVL(pa.POS_NM, '-') LIKE '%' || #{afPosNm} || '%'
AND NVL(h.PROMO_RSN, '-') LIKE '%' || #{promoRsn} || '%'

SELECT d.APRV_NO AS aprvNo, TO_CHAR(d.SUBMIT_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS submitDtm, NVL(ft.FORM_NM, '-') AS formNm, NVL(d.DOC_WRTR_EMP_NM, em.EMP_NM) AS empNm, d.APRV_TTL AS aprvTtl, d.STAT_CD AS statCd, NVL(sc.STAT_NM, d.STAT_CD) AS statNm, CASE WHEN d.FINAL_DTM IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(d.FINAL_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') END AS finalDtm FROM APRV_DOC d JOIN EMP em ON em.EMP_NO = d.EMP_NO LEFT JOIN APRV_FORM_TYPE ft ON ft.FORM_CD = d.FORM_CD LEFT JOIN APRV_STAT_CD sc ON sc.STAT_DIV = 'DOC' AND sc.STAT_CD = d.STAT_CD
AND d.FORM_CD = #{formCd}
AND NVL(d.DOC_WRTR_EMP_NM, em.EMP_NM) LIKE '%' || #{empNm} || '%'
AND d.APRV_TTL LIKE '%' || #{aprvTtl} || '%'
AND d.STAT_CD = #{statCd}
AND d.SUBMIT_DTM >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND d.SUBMIT_DTM < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
ORDER BY d.SUBMIT_DTM DESC, d.APRV_NO DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM APRV_DOC d JOIN EMP em ON em.EMP_NO = d.EMP_NO LEFT JOIN APRV_FORM_TYPE ft ON ft.FORM_CD = d.FORM_CD LEFT JOIN APRV_STAT_CD sc ON sc.STAT_DIV = 'DOC' AND sc.STAT_CD = d.STAT_CD
AND d.FORM_CD = #{formCd}
AND NVL(d.DOC_WRTR_EMP_NM, em.EMP_NM) LIKE '%' || #{empNm} || '%'
AND d.APRV_TTL LIKE '%' || #{aprvTtl} || '%'
AND d.STAT_CD = #{statCd}
AND d.SUBMIT_DTM >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND d.SUBMIT_DTM < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1

SELECT d.APRV_NO AS aprvNo, TO_CHAR(d.SUBMIT_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS submitDtm, CASE WHEN d.FINAL_DTM IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(d.FINAL_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') END AS finalDtm, d.FORM_CD AS formCd, NVL(ft.FORM_NM, '-') AS formNm, d.EMP_NO AS empNo, NVL(d.DOC_WRTR_EMP_NM, em.EMP_NM) AS empNm, d.DOC_WRTR_DEPT_CD AS docWrtrDeptCd, NVL(dd.DEPT_NM, '-') AS docWrtrDeptNm, d.DOC_WRTR_POS_CD AS docWrtrPosCd, NVL(dp.POS_NM, '-') AS docWrtrPosNm, d.STAT_CD AS statCd, NVL(sc.STAT_NM, d.STAT_CD) AS statNm, d.HR_APPLY_YN AS hrApplyYn, CASE WHEN d.HR_APPLY_YN = 'Y' THEN '반영' WHEN d.HR_APPLY_YN = 'N' THEN '미반영' ELSE '-' END AS hrApplyNm, d.APRV_TTL AS aprvTtl, d.APRV_CN AS aprvCn, NVL(d.DOC_STAT_CMT, '-') AS docStatCmt FROM APRV_DOC d JOIN EMP em ON em.EMP_NO = d.EMP_NO LEFT JOIN DEPT dd ON dd.DEPT_CD = d.DOC_WRTR_DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN POSITION_MST dp ON dp.POS_CD = d.DOC_WRTR_POS_CD LEFT JOIN APRV_FORM_TYPE ft ON ft.FORM_CD = d.FORM_CD LEFT JOIN APRV_STAT_CD sc ON sc.STAT_DIV = 'DOC' AND sc.STAT_CD = d.STAT_CD WHERE d.APRV_NO = #{aprvNo}

SELECT d.APRV_NO AS aprvNo, TO_CHAR(d.SUBMIT_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS submitDtm, CASE WHEN d.FINAL_DTM IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(d.FINAL_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') END AS finalDtm, d.FORM_CD AS formCd, NVL(ft.FORM_NM, '-') AS formNm, d.EMP_NO AS empNo, NVL(d.DOC_WRTR_EMP_NM, em.EMP_NM) AS empNm, d.DOC_WRTR_DEPT_CD AS docWrtrDeptCd, NVL(dd.DEPT_NM, '-') AS docWrtrDeptNm, d.DOC_WRTR_POS_CD AS docWrtrPosCd, NVL(dp.POS_NM, '-') AS docWrtrPosNm, d.STAT_CD AS statCd, NVL(sc.STAT_NM, d.STAT_CD) AS statNm, d.HR_APPLY_YN AS hrApplyYn, CASE WHEN d.HR_APPLY_YN = 'Y' THEN '반영' WHEN d.HR_APPLY_YN = 'N' THEN '미반영' ELSE '-' END AS hrApplyNm, d.APRV_TTL AS aprvTtl, d.APRV_CN AS aprvCn, NVL(d.DOC_STAT_CMT, '-') AS docStatCmt FROM APRV_DOC d JOIN EMP em ON em.EMP_NO = d.EMP_NO LEFT JOIN DEPT dd ON dd.DEPT_CD = d.DOC_WRTR_DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN POSITION_MST dp ON dp.POS_CD = d.DOC_WRTR_POS_CD LEFT JOIN APRV_FORM_TYPE ft ON ft.FORM_CD = d.FORM_CD LEFT JOIN APRV_STAT_CD sc ON sc.STAT_DIV = 'DOC' AND sc.STAT_CD = d.STAT_CD
AND d.FORM_CD = #{formCd}
AND NVL(d.DOC_WRTR_EMP_NM, em.EMP_NM) LIKE '%' || #{empNm} || '%'
AND d.APRV_TTL LIKE '%' || #{aprvTtl} || '%'
AND d.STAT_CD = #{statCd}
AND d.SUBMIT_DTM >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND d.SUBMIT_DTM < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
ORDER BY d.SUBMIT_DTM DESC, d.APRV_NO DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT FORM_CD AS code, FORM_NM AS name FROM APRV_FORM_TYPE ORDER BY FORM_CD

SELECT STAT_CD AS code, STAT_NM AS name FROM APRV_STAT_CD WHERE STAT_DIV = 'DOC' ORDER BY CASE STAT_CD WHEN 'SUBMITTED' THEN 1 WHEN 'IN_PROGRESS' THEN 2 WHEN 'APPROVED' THEN 3 WHEN 'REJECTED' THEN 4 WHEN 'CANCELED' THEN 5 ELSE 99 END, STAT_CD
